name: Instant Chocolate Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon instant coffee or 1/3 cup strong coffee
3 tablespoons sweet Pesach wine, Pesach liqueur, or other suitable alternative
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chocolate and instant coffee in a food processor fitted with a steel blade or a blender. Process for a few seconds until the chocolate is finely chopped.
2. With the machine running, pour in the boiling water through the top and continue processing for several more seconds until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. Add the egg yolks and wine to the mixture and process until well combined.
4. In a medium-sized bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the chocolate mixture into the beaten egg whites until no streaks of white remain.
6. Turn the mousse into serving dishes and chill for several hours until firm.
7. Serves 6
